title: Bella Thorne makes her Oscars debut in Gucci, talks love and UFO abductions
description: Bella Thorne makes her Oscars debut in self-styled Gucci and opens up about anxiety, working with husband Mark Emms, and more.

title: Scientists, Government, and Aviation Experts Call for Global Detection Network at the UAP Tracking and Detection Summit
description: Speakers, including keynote U.S. Representative Eric Burlison (R-MO), say progress requires data, technology, and open scientific collaboration.

title: The UK's top UFO expert Nick Pope has been diagnosed with Stage 4 oesophageal cancer
description: The former Ministry of Defence (MoD) official was at the helm of what was dubbed Britain's "UFO Desk" for three years from 1991 to 1994, and Pope worked on some of the most high-profile sightings and cases, including investigating the case file on The Rendlesham UFO incident that occurred in 1980.

title: Why Wright-Patterson Air Force Base remains central to decades of UFO lore - CNN

title: Retired Air Force major general missing for weeks once led Wright-Patterson, an Ohio base steeped in decades of UFO theories
description: By Alaa Elassar, CNN (CNN) — Streetlights shaped like alien heads line the roads of Roswell, New Mexico, where murals of flying saucers streak across storefronts and tourists pose beside statues of little green men.
